hooks.command: Set-Location 'C:\Users\Udbhav\market-reels'; git add src/ scripts/ package.json package-lock.json remotion.config.ts tsconfig.json CLAUDE.md .env.example .gitignore data-input.json .claude/settings.json 2>&1 | Out-Null; git diff --staged --quiet; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { git commit -m ('Auto-sync ' + (Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm')); git push }
